name: Schaebens Eye & Lip Anti-Wrinkle Mask (Germany)
notes: My top beauty pick. German brand, tiny weight, 4.5★ on Amazon, exploding on Shajgoj/Sajeeb. Pack 50 in one bag = ৳25k profit per trip.

name: Garnier Micellar Cleansing Water 700ml
notes: Heavy & bulky — limits per-trip qty. BD market full of fakes so 'imported original' angle works, but margin is thin after weight cost.

name: Johnson's Vita-Rich Body Wash 400ml
notes: Safe daily-use brand. Margin is okay but not exciting; treat as filler item, not the hero SKU.

name: Dermoviva Age Renewal Handwash 3-pack
notes: Dabur Middle East exclusive — not officially sold in BD. Real scarcity premium. Good for FB Live commerce.

name: Bath & Body Works Body Mist (KSA stock)
notes: HERO SKU. BD female 18-35 segment buys frantically; counterfeits everywhere locally. Stack 25-30 per trip.

name: Bath & Body Works Body Lotion / Cream
notes: Same logic as the mist. Pair them; mist+lotion gift bundle resells for ৳7,000+.

name: Saudi Oud / Bakhoor (premium niche)
notes: Highest margin/weight ratio in the entire list. BD religious & upper-middle segment pays anything for authentic Saudi oud.

name: Attar / Concentrated Perfume Oils 12ml
notes: HERO SKU. Pack 100 in one bag = ৳1.3 lakh profit. Sells through every mosque-area shop in BD.

name: L'Oreal Paris Revitalift Serum
notes: Established brand, easy resale on Daraz Mall. Stable seller, not a breakout.

name: The Ordinary Niacinamide / Hyaluronic Serum
notes: K-beauty / minimalist serum cult following in BD. Cheap entry, great margin, super light.

name: Nivea Black & White Deodorant
notes: Volume play. Decent margin per unit but you need to move 100+ to make it worthwhile.

name: Vaseline Original Lotion 600ml
notes: Heavy. Only profitable if combined with light items in same suitcase.

name: Sensodyne Toothpaste (multi-pack)
notes: Trusted brand. Steady seller; no fireworks but also no risk.

name: Liqui Moly Injection Cleaner 300ml
notes: Premium German brand worshipped in BD car FB groups. Verified original = guaranteed sale.

name: Liqui Moly Engine Flush 500ml
notes: Pair with the injection cleaner; mechanics buy them together.

name: Liqui Moly Top Tec 5W-30 Engine Oil 5L
notes: High margin BUT 4.5kg each — only 5-6 per checked bag. Sea freight at scale.

name: Areon X-Version Hanging Air Freshener
notes: Tiny per-unit profit but pack 100+ per trip. Repeat purchase. Solid filler.

name: Lamicall 5-Layer Foldable Sunshade
notes: Pitch as 'Saudi heat-tested'. Sells well in summer (Mar-Sep).

name: Armor All Wash & Wax 1.89L
notes: Heavy. Only worth it for direct B2B sale to detailing shops.

name: ShowTop Microfiber Drying Towels (3-pack)
notes: Detailing culture growing in Dhaka. B2B to shops works better than retail.

name: Bosch Wiper Blades (Aerotwin)
notes: Light, branded, BD has tons of fakes. Strong margin.

name: NGK Iridium Spark Plugs (set of 4)
notes: Mechanics LOVE verified-genuine NGK. Sell at Tejgaon / Dholaikhal markets.

name: Meguiar's Quick Detailer 473ml
notes: Cult car-care brand. Good upsell with microfiber towels.

name: Huawei Band 11 Fitness Tracker (KSA exclusive)
notes: HERO SKU. Light, branded, BD tech buyers want guaranteed-original. ৳4.5k profit per unit.

name: Anker PowerCore 20000mAh Power Bank
notes: Anker = BD's most-counterfeited charger brand. Verified original sells fast.

name: Apple AirPods 4
notes: High ticket. Customs at HSIA may flag if unboxed. Best as personal-baggage one-at-a-time.

name: Samsung 256GB EVO Plus microSD
notes: Tiny, light, high markup. Massive fake market in BD. Pack 50+ per trip easily.

name: Anker USB-C Charger 65W GaN
notes: GaN chargers are trending. Anker brand premium + fast delivery.

name: JBL Tune 510BT Wireless Headphones
notes: Affordable JBL = very popular gift item in BD. Consistent seller.

name: Apple 20W USB-C Power Adapter
notes: BD market 90% counterfeit. Genuine sells at premium to iPhone owners.

name: Apple Lightning to USB-C Cable 1m
notes: Same fake-saturation issue. Verified Apple cable = guaranteed sale.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S Mouse
notes: Premium productivity mouse. BD office/dev community buys these.

name: Logitech MX Keys Keyboard
notes: Heavy + bulky. Bundle with the mouse for office buyers.

name: Kindle Paperwhite (latest gen)
notes: Niche but loyal BD reader market. Light, easy to carry.

name: LEGO Speed Champions Ferrari SF-24
notes: BD has rampant LEGO counterfeits. Verified-authentic boxed sets command 70%+ premium.

name: LEGO Technic / Creator sets
notes: Birthday gift segment. Adult collectors too.

name: Gemmicc 100-pc Magnetic Tiles
notes: HERO SKU for premium-school parents. STEM/Montessori segment pays anything.

name: Hot Wheels 20-Car Pack
notes: Cheap entry, decent margin, kids' birthday party staple in BD.

name: Barbie Dreamhouse Doll Sets
notes: Original Barbie commands strong premium vs the Bashundhara fakes.

name: Play-Doh Mega Pack
notes: Heavy for the margin. Only if your suitcase has space.

name: Squishy / Stress Toys (assorted, bulk)
notes: Trending kid item. Pack 100+ per trip. Easy FB Live seller.

name: Bosch Professional Sanding Pads
notes: Sell at Nawabpur / Tipu Sultan Rd tools market. Tradesmen pay 2-3x for verified Bosch.

name: Bosch Cutting Discs (set)
notes: B2B sale to workshops. Stable demand year-round.

name: Stanley Tape Measure 8m
notes: Solid daily-tool brand. Mid-tier seller.

name: Makita Cordless Drill 18V
notes: Heavy — sea freight only. BD pro-tradesmen segment is loyal to Makita.

name: Bosch Laser Distance Measure
notes: Light, branded, contractors love it. Strong margin.

name: DEGOL Speed Skipping Rope
notes: Crossfit / home-gym surge in Dhaka. Daraz Mall mover.

name: Resistance Bands Set
notes: Decent margin; many competitors at this price tier in BD.

name: Yoga Mat (premium TPE)
notes: Bulky. Roll into checked bag; 5-6 per trip max.

name: Anawnas Portable Electric Shattaf
notes: Hajj/Umrah angle for BD pilgrims = year-round demand. Strong gift item.

name: Whey Protein (Optimum Nutrition Gold Std)
notes: Heavy. Gym community pays premium for verified ON. Limit 2-3 tubs/trip.

name: Creatine Monohydrate (MyProtein/ON)
notes: BD gym scene exploding. Lighter than whey, better margin per kg.

name: Ajwa Dates 1kg (premium box)
notes: HERO SKU during Ramadan + Hajj-returnee gift season. Lock down a Saudi farm wholesale relationship.

name: Sukkari Dates 1kg
notes: Cheaper-but-popular alternative to Ajwa. Family gift segment.

name: Mejdool Dates 1kg
notes: Premium-eating date. Corporate Eid gift box potential.

name: Zamzam Water 5L (gift bottle)
notes: Massive emotional premium BUT cannot publicly advertise + heavy. Private orders only.

name: Saudi Honey (Sidr / Acacia, 500g)
notes: Sidr honey is a luxury gift category in BD. Authenticity story is the whole pitch.

name: Saffron (Iranian/Saudi, 5g)
notes: Tiny, ultra-light, biggest profit/gram on the entire list. Wedding & catering market.

name: Nutella 750g jar
notes: Heavy + glass = breakage risk. Only as filler.

name: Tefal Non-stick Pan Set
notes: Heavy. Trusted brand but freight eats margin. B2B to home-store chains works better.

name: Philips Hair Dryer
notes: Wedding-season strong seller. Original Philips beats local imports.

name: Braun MultiQuick Hand Blender
notes: Premium kitchen brand. Bulky but stable margin.

name: Tupperware Set (KSA originals)
notes: Aunty market loves originals. Dhanmondi / Gulshan housewife segment.

name: Pampers Premium Care Diapers (jumbo)
notes: Heavy + low margin per kg. Skip unless customer pre-orders.

name: Aptamil / Nutrilon Infant Formula
notes: Strong demand from BD upper-middle moms. Customs scrutiny — accompanied baggage only.

name: Sudocrem 250g
notes: Cheap, light, every BD mom wants original. Pack 30+ per trip easily.

name: Casio G-Shock (entry models)
notes: Light, durable, brand premium. BD has 90% fake market — verified G-Shock sells fast.

name: Casio Edifice / Vintage
notes: Office-wear segment. Solid mid-ticket SKU.

name: Ray-Ban Aviator Sunglasses
notes: Massive fake market. Genuine = strong premium BUT customer needs to trust seller. Photo every step.

name: Centrum Multivitamin (KSA stock)
notes: Trusted multivitamin brand. Consistent seller, low risk.

name: Omron Blood Pressure Monitor
notes: BD aging population growing. Pharmacy + home buyers.

name: Accu-Chek Glucose Meter + strips
notes: Diabetic supplies are scarce/fake in BD. Verified strips sell continuously.

name: PRAN Mango Frooto (case of 24)
notes: BD expat household staple. Strong recurring sales but needs SFDA approval first.

name: PRAN Litchi / Guava Juice (case)
notes: Same channel as Frooto. Bundle them in shipments.

name: PRAN Chanachur (case of 30)
notes: Top expat-grocery seller. Daily-buy item; high reorder rate.

name: Bombay Sweets Potato Crackers (case)
notes: Nostalgia snack. Sells alongside Pran chanachur.

name: Mr. Noodles (PRAN, multi-pack)
notes: BD kid favorite. Expat moms buy by the carton.

name: Ispahani Mirzapore Tea 500g
notes: Easy SFDA category, long shelf life. Distinct flavor expats can't find locally.

name: Kazi & Kazi Organic Tea
notes: Premium organic angle works for Saudi locals too, not just expats.

name: Radhuni Beef Masala 50g
notes: TOP SKU. BD housewives in KSA seek this exact brand. Indian/Pakistani brands aren't substitutes.

name: Radhuni Chicken Masala 50g
notes: Daily-cook essential.

name: Radhuni Biriyani Masala
notes: Eid-special spike. Stock heavy before Eid.

name: Pran Turmeric Powder 200g
notes: Solid steady seller; not a star but rounds out a shipment.

name: Pure Mustard Oil (Radhuni 1L)
notes: Authentic pungent BD mustard oil — unmatched in Saudi shops. Sea freight by case.

name: Teer Mustard Oil 1L
notes: Direct competitor to Radhuni; carry both, let customers pick.

name: Hilsa Fish (Padma, IQF, 1kg)
notes: ICONIC. Massive emotional premium. Cold-chain critical; SFDA + halal cert required. Don't ship under 200kg.

name: Shutki (Loitta, vacuum-sealed) 500g
notes: Cult expat product. Strict packaging required (odor / customs).

name: Premium Ghee (Baghabari 500g)
notes: HERO SKU. Authentic 'desi ghee' valued by all South Asian expats AND Saudi locals.

name: Pran Ghee 1kg
notes: Larger pack — better unit economics for B2B grocery.

name: Milk Vita Powdered Milk 500g
notes: Niche; competes with global brands. Only worth it as part of a Bangla-grocery bundle.

name: Shorshe (Mustard) Paste / Kasundi
notes: Niche but loyal demand. Glass-jar packaging needs care.

name: Ahmed Pickles (mango / lemon) 400g
notes: Easy SFDA; small jars are Amazon.sa-friendly.

name: Pran Mango Pickle 1kg
notes: Larger pack for restaurants/families. Bundle pricing wins.

name: Jamdani Saree (mid-tier handloom)
notes: HERO. Wedding + Eid gifting among BD expats. Apparel is duty-friendly. Excellent Amazon.sa fit.

name: Tangail Cotton Saree
notes: Daily-wear premium for BD aunties in KSA.

name: Mirpur Benarosi Saree
notes: High ticket, high margin. Wedding-only segment but big basket size.

name: Men's Cotton Panjabi (premium)
notes: Eid + Friday-prayer wear for BD diaspora.

name: Lungi (Pabna premium)
notes: Volume play. 2.6M BD laborers in KSA. B2B-sell to Bangla grocery shops in Riyadh/Jeddah.

name: Gamcha (cotton towel)
notes: Cheap, light, ships by sea or air. Tradition + utility purchase.

name: Aarong Jute Bag / Tote
notes: Saudi Vision 2030 sustainability + boho aesthetic = strong sell. Light, FBA-friendly.

name: Jute Floor Mat / Rug
notes: Bulkier; ship by sea. Decor segment.

name: Jute / Bamboo Lamp Shade
notes: Niche but Instagram-friendly. Boutique listing potential.

name: Nakshi Kantha (hand-embroidered throw)
notes: Boutique gift segment for upscale Saudi homes. Tells a craft story; premium pricing.

name: Cotton Bedsheet Set (Aarong)
notes: Solid bridal-gift segment for BD families in KSA.

name: Brass / Pottery Decor Pieces
notes: Heavy. Best as one-off boutique listings, not bulk.

name: Apex Leather Wallet (men's)
notes: BD leather is globally exported. Apex brand has quality cred. Gift segment.

name: Bay Leather Belt
notes: Office-wear segment for KSA-based South Asian professionals.

name: Picard Leather Handbag (BD-made)
notes: Higher ticket. Use LWG-certified tannery story for KSA buyer comfort.

name: Leather Prayer Mat (premium)
notes: Sharp niche — Saudi locals + expats both buy. Gift-grade item.

name: Banoful Sweets Gift Box (shelf-stable)
notes: Festival nostalgia buy (Pohela Boishakh, Eid). Shelf-stable variants only.

name: Premium Sweets Branded Mishti
notes: Eid spike sales. Pre-order model works best.

name: Bashundhara Tissue (case)
notes: Tight margin commodity; only works at full-container scale to KSA distributors.

name: Fresh / Meril Soap (multi-pack)
notes: BD brand loyalty among expats. Stable seller.

name: BD-Made T-Shirts (export quality)
notes: BD makes 60% of world's cotton T-shirts. Source factory seconds at Mirpur DEPZ for huge margins on Amazon.sa.

name: Hijab / Scarves (cotton & georgette)
notes: KSA daily-wear category, huge volume. Mass-market angle. Easy Amazon.sa listing.
